title: Better Flight Revived
description: Active Elytra flight with takeoff, flapping, flaring, stamina, and HUD feedback.
body:
# Better Flight Revived

**Better Flight Revived** brings the classic [Better Flight Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-flight-forge) experience forward to **Minecraft 1.21.1** with modern Fabric and NeoForge support.

Vanilla Elytra are great, but they lean heavily on fireworks. This mod makes flight feel more active and skill-based with takeoff, flapping, flaring, stamina management, and HUD feedback.

[![](https://dcbadge.limes.pink/api/server/https://discord.gg/6c6cDU2mKj)](https://discord.gg/6c6cDU2mKj)

## What It Adds

- **Sprint + double jump takeoff** for smoother Elytra launches.
- **Wing flapping** for controlled lift without relying entirely on fireworks.
- **Modern boost mode** for stronger near-ground movement.
- **Flare braking** by holding `X` while flying, making landings easier and more controlled.
- **Flight stamina** so long-distance flight has a light survival cost.
- **HUD feedback** for stamina and Elytra durability.
- **Configurable behavior** for costs, recharge speed, hunger exhaustion, ceiling limits, and extra wing items.

## Compatibility

Better Flight Revived supports both major mod loaders for Minecraft 1.21.1:

- **Fabric**
- **NeoForge**

It also detects Elytra-style equipment from supported slot/backpack mods:

- **Trinkets** on Fabric
- **Curios API** on NeoForge
- **Beans Backpacks 3** on Fabric and NeoForge

## Requirements

### Fabric

- Minecraft **1.21.1**
- Java **21**
- Fabric Loader **0.19.2+**
- Fabric API
- Architectury API **13.0.8+**

### NeoForge

- Minecraft **1.21.1**
- Java **21**
- NeoForge **21.1+**
- Architectury API **13.0.8+**

## Optional Integrations

- Trinkets **3.10.0+**
- Curios API **9.5.1+**
- Beans Backpacks 3 **0.12+**

## Credits

- **Rejah Tavi** for the original Better Flight mod.
- **ArkVeil** for prior Better Flight work.
- **SeniorS** for reviving and porting the mod to Minecraft 1.21.1.

## Support

Found a bug, balance issue, or compatibility problem? Open an issue on GitHub or join the Discord.

- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/Senior-S/Better-Flight-Revived/issues)
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/6c6cDU2mKj)
